hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(make deploy|kubectl apply)'; then cd /home/alekonko/github/alekonko/spotiplay && source .venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null; uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 19999 &>/tmp/hook-predeploy.txt & PID=$!; sleep 2; if ! curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:19999/api/auth-status >/dev/null 2>&1; then kill $PID 2>/dev/null; echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"App non risponde su /api/auth-status — deploy bloccato. Controlla l'ambiente con make install.\"}" && exit 0; fi; kill $PID 2>/dev/null; fi

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); output=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_response.stdout // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit'; then if ! echo "$output" | grep -q 'CHANGELOG'; then echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"Ricorda: aggiorna [Unreleased] con /update-changelog_unreleased\"}" ; fi; fi
